ops.text:
RESULTS E30.3 stage 0 + E30.4, both VERIFY-confirmed (zero discrepancies, exact recomputes; ~375k tokens, $0 model spend).

E30.3: PRIMARY κ_binary(judge pv6 vs auditor) = 0.618, 95% CI [0.555, 0.681] — entirely inside the 0.5–0.75 band → LADDER VERDICT: PoLL 3-JURY for any single-model LLM judging in Wave 0; ci_spans_boundary=false → Stage 1 Rating Roulette does NOT trigger ($8–15 saved). κ_category=0.590; raw agreement 80.6%/65.4%. E20 quarantine vacuous: all 541 rows are opus-labeled on both sides (gpt-5.5 strings in the parquet are transcript content, not labels). CAMPAIGN-SHAPING HETEROGENEITY: (a) bimodal by auditor prompt version — pv5 κ=0.822 (n=225, near single-judge grade) vs pv3 0.499 / pv4 0.464; disagreement mass concentrates in the older auditor protocols (open reading: judge error vs auditor-protocol drift — do not over-conclude from pooled asymmetry). (b) The judge OVER-FLAGS steering: 93 judge-steering/auditor-not vs 12 reverse (base rates 61.2% vs 46.2%). (c) operational_directive is the category sink: auditor 150 vs judge 80; top flips direction→od(24), wrong_approach→od(22), new_task→od(17); 'other' unusable (≤5 uses both sides); question & status_update cleanest (judge precision 0.95). (b)+(c) are binding design inputs for E33/E35 targeting. Artifacts: E30/e30_3/out/{results.json, report.md, category_confusion…csv}, compute.py, verify/.

E30.4: calib.py (ece equal-mass 10-bin faithful to lexical.py semantics — verified by independent equal-width reimpl reproducing repo reference numbers exactly; brier; aurc; split_conformal) + baselines: incumbent watcher n=628 ECE 0.108, Brier 0.122, AURC 0.057 (confidence ordering informative — E38 premise supported); E29 FT pick n=202 ECE 0.083, Brier(top) 0.215. Conformal COMPUTED (contingency not needed — preds_pool.jsonl 566 rows fully session+id disjoint): 90% target → τ=0.8613, realized coverage 0.931, avg set 2.42; 80% → 0.856/1.97; no empty sets; caveat pool-vs-eval acc shift (0.521 vs 0.604) → descriptive baseline, certified guarantee deferred to E38. Artifacts: E30/e30_4/{calib.py, selfcheck.py, out/, verify/}. Remaining in E30: .5 σ_train → .2a cross-fit → .2b monitor → .6 card v2.
